rationale: Educ. Code §12.1168 governs financial reporting disclosures for open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A financial report filed under Section 44.008 by an open-enrollment charter school must separately disclose:
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns charter school financial reporting and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
